The Vision

Not one thing. Not two things.
Everything.

Élan Agency was not built to be one thing. It was built to be the only thing. A house that represents the best of everything it touches — from the talent we champion to the experiences we curate, the properties we sell, and the products we create.

What We Do

One house.
Infinite possibility.

01
Real Estate
Prestige property across Queensland. Buying, selling, managing, and investing at the highest level of the market.
Active
02
Talent
Representing sports stars, actors, and entertainers. Building careers, protecting legacies, creating opportunities others cannot see.
Launching Soon
03
Fragrance
Scents of Élan. Eleven luxury hand-poured candles inspired by the world's most iconic fragrances. Hand-crafted in Brisbane.
Available Now
04
Timepieces
Watches of Élan. A curated collection of luxury timepieces for those who understand that time is the ultimate luxury.
Coming Soon
05
And Beyond
Events. Creative. Experiences. Ventures not yet named. Élan Agency is not finished. It is only beginning.
In Development
Why Élan

Built different.
Built for
the extraordinary.

Most companies pick a lane. Élan Agency refused. We saw no reason why the same vision that champions a world-class athlete could not also sell a prestige home, pour a luxury candle, or build a watch collection that belongs on Bond Street.

The thread that connects everything is Élan. The standard. The obsession. The refusal to do anything at less than its absolute best. Founded in Brisbane in 2015 and operating without limits ever since.

"Élan Agency is not a business.
It is a declaration."
01
One Standard
Whether selling a $5M home or launching a candle collection, the commitment to excellence never changes.
02
Brisbane Born
Founded in Queensland in 2015. Operating without borders or limits ever since.
03
People First
Every client, every talent, every customer is the most important relationship we have. Full stop.
04
Always Building
Élan Agency is not a finished product. It is a living house that adds new chapters as the vision demands.
